item.text: {"output":"Batch 2 status is unchanged: T3 is complete and verified; T7 implementation is complete locally but remains blocked on external deploy/curl validation because this environment lacks `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN`, outbound DNS/network access, and Docker for local edge serving.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useEffectResources.ts","src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useEffectResources.test.tsx","supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.ts","supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.test.ts","config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts",".megaplan/plans/build-an-llm-powered-custom-20260326-2230/execution_batch_2.json"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useEffectResources.test.tsx","npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.test.ts","npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false","npx supabase functions deploy ai-generate-effect --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc","supabase functions deploy ai-generate-effect --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc","supabase functions serve ai-generate-effect --env-file .env","curl -I --max-time 10 https://wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc.supabase.co"],"deviations":["T7 cannot be fully closed in this environment: direct deploy requires a Supabase CLI access token that is not configured, outbound DNS/network access to Supabase is unavailable, and local `supabase functions serve` is blocked because Docker is not running."],"task_updates":[{"task_id":"T3","status":"done","executor_notes":"`useEffectResources()` and the fixed-type create/update/delete wrappers are implemented and verified. Focused hook tests confirmed de-duplication by resource ID, correct grouping into `entrance`/`exit`/`continuous`, and correct mutation payload wrapping with `type: 'effect'`. TypeScript check passed.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useEffectResources.ts","src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useEffectResources.test.tsx"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useEffectResources.test.tsx","npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false"]},{"task_id":"T7","status":"blocked","executor_notes":"`ai-generate-effect/index.ts` is implemented with auth via `bootstrapEdgeHandler`, per-user rate limiting, Groq generation with fallback, and fenced-code extraction. Edge-unit tests verify auth handling, rate-limit handling, invalid-category rejection, and clean code responses. Deployment and curl verification remain blocked by missing `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN`, unavailable outbound DNS/network, and no Docker daemon for local edge serving.","files_changed":["supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.ts","supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.test.ts","config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.test.ts","npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false","npx supabase functions deploy ai-generate-effect --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc","supabase functions deploy ai-generate-effect --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc","supabase functions serve ai-generate-effect --env-file .env","curl -I --max-time 10 https://wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc.supabase.co"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC3","executor_note":"Verified `useEffectResources()` de-duplicates identical resource IDs across private and public lists and groups the merged results into `entrance`, `exit`, and `continuous` buckets."},{"sense_check_id":"SC7","executor_note":"The edge function requires auth, enforces rate limiting, and returns cleaned code with markdown fences stripped; those behaviors are covered by unit tests. It has not been deployed or curl-tested here because the environment lacks a Supabase CLI access token, outbound DNS/network access, and Docker for local serving."}]}
